title: arenaria ligericina subsp. ligericina
intro: Arenaria ligericina subsp. ligericina, also known as Ligerica or Yellow Mountain Centaury, is a plant species that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) and is native to China. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting immune function. Arenaria ligericina subsp. ligericina is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
